lead_headline: South Broadway Takes Another Hit as Filings Climb

restaurant.blurb: 3 openings, 2 closures detected today. Weekly tally stands at 13 openings against 5 closures — net positive, but two South Broadway losses overnight signal continued pressure on the corridor. Last week was 9 and 3, so the pace is accelerating both ways.

foreclosure.blurb: 23 new filings this week, up sharply from 17 last week — a 35% jump. Three properties exceed $2M, all Cherry Creek and Wash Park. The high-end segment is showing fresh stress not seen since Q3 2025.

retail.blurb: Data pipeline under construction. First metrics expected Q2 2026.

revenue.blurb: Dashboard consolidation in progress. Launch expected Q3 2026.

reputation.blurb: Web citation tracking on the roadmap. Expected Q4 2026.
